test_runs.command: cd functions_python; $env:PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE='1'; .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests\test_optimizer_p0_contracts.py tests\test_optimizer_core.py tests\test_suitability_v2.py -q -p no:cacheprovider

cd functions_python; $env:PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE='1'; .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests\test_optimizer_p0_contracts.py tests\test_optimizer_core.py tests\test_feasibility_precheck.py tests\test_suitability_v2.py tests\test_quant_core.py tests\test_optimizer_invariants.py -q -p no:cacheprovider

notes: Failures are outside the OPT-3 P0 optimizer contract set.

Examples include scripts/e2e_smoke_test.py fixture collection, scripts/tests/test_optimizer_v2.py FinancialEngine exposure None handling, legacy services.optimizer patch path, backtester/analyzer/frontier short-history expectations, and backend app xray callable wrapper tests.
Failures are outside the OPT-3 P0 optimizer contract set.
